preserved_instructions_excerpt:
GROW WITH RASINDU 
  
TIME-LAPSE LIFE STORY VIDEOS - PROMPT SET 
 
1.​ Prompt 1 එක copy කරලා claude එකට දෙන්න 
2.​ ඊටපස්සෙ එන list එකෙන් කැමති එකක් copy කරලා paste කරන්න 
3.​ ඊටපස්සෙ දෙන සම්පූර්ණ prompt එක google gemini එකට දීලා image එක genarate 
කරගන්න. 
4.​ ඊටපස්සෙ ඒ එන image එක download වෙන්න දාලා road renovation videos වල කරා වගේ 
පලවෙනියට හදාගත්ත image එක කො
පි කරලා gemini එකට paste කරගෙන දෙවනි prompt 
එක copy කරලා paste කරලා දෙවනි image එක හදාගන්න.  
5.​ මේ විදියට 2,3,4 prompt ටිකෙන් අනිත් image ටිකත් හදාගන්න.( තේරුනේ නැත්තන්  road 
renovation videos හදන විදිය කියල දුන්න video එක බලන්න ) 
6.​ අවසානෙට image හතර capcut එකට දාලා image එකෙන්  image එකට පහල image එකේ 
වගේ texts add කරලා  ගැලපෙන music එකක් දාගෙන export කරගන්න . 
 

JOIN OUR TELEGRAM CHANNEL👉 GrowWithRasindu 
 
 
PROMPT - 1 
You are a creative AI image prompt generator specializing in Google  
Street View style photography. 
 

STEP 1: Generate exactly 10 warm and candid family moment scenes  
taking place in a rural front yard or garden (numbered 1-10, one line  
each). Scenes must feel genuine and emotionally real - multi-generational  
families (grandparents + parents + kids) caught in natural everyday  
moments together. Examples: grandma teaching granddaughter to bake  
outside, whole family celebrating a birthday in the garden, dad and  
kids fixing an old bicycle while grandpa supervises, family gathered  
around a bonfire in the evening. 
 
STEP 2: Wait for me to pick a number. 
 
STEP 3: Generate a detailed image prompt using these fixed rules: 
 
- Camera: Google Street View sideways-mounted camera, car roof  
  visible at bottom corner, road runs diagonally through frame 
 
- Location: Central/Eastern European rural village, modest  
  plastered house, red terracotta tile roof, low metal fence,  
  flower garden, narrow cracked asphalt road, utility poles 
 
- People: Multi-generational family (grandparents, parents,  
  children), all faces blurred/pixelated (Street View style),  
  candid natural poses, casual summer clothing 
 
- Color grading & mood: Muted natural tones, slightly desaturated  
  greens and browns, pale overcast sky with soft diffused light,  
  no harsh shadows, faded film-like quality, colors feel real and  
  unglamorous - exactly like an authentic Google Street View capture.  
  Terracotta roof warm but dull, grass is deep natural green,  
  road is grey-beige weathered asphalt 
 
- Style: Photorealistic, candid, unposed, emotional, documentary  
  photography, feels like a real accidental capture, no filters,  
  no cinematic color grading 
 
- Light: Natural daylight, soft overcast sky, flat even lighting,  
  slightly cloudy summer afternoon 
 
- Format: 9:16 vertical 
 
Start with Step 1 now. 
 
PROMPT - 2 

Google Street View capture, 9:16 vertical format. Same road, same angle, same modest 
Central/Eastern European rural house with terracotta tile roof, low metal fence, utility poles. Five 
years have passed. The house shows subtle aging — paint slightly more faded, one shutter 
hinge loose. The vegetable garden is still tended but slightly less neat. The grandfather is 
absent from the scene. The grandmother sits alone in a garden chair near the fence, visibly 
older, watching. The mother, now slightly aged, works the garden rows alone. The older child is 
now a young teenager, helping carry a basket. The younger child runs nearby. All faces 
pixelated Street View style. The garden feels quieter, one presence missing without explanation. 
Same muted desaturated color grading, flat overcast daylight, faded film quality, unglamorous, 
no filters. Cracked asphalt road diagonal in foreground, car rooftop visible in corner. 
 
PROMPT - 3 
Google Street View capture, 9:16 vertical format. Same house, same road angle, same village 
setting. Ten years have passed. The plaster on the house wall is visibly cracked and stained 
with damp patches. The fence has a bent section never repaired. The flower border is 
overgrown and untamed. The grandmother is no longer present in the yard. The mother, now 
middle-aged, stands near the doorstep alone, looking toward the road. The teenage child from 
before is now a young adult, seen briefly near the gate as if visiting, not living there. No children 
playing. The garden plot is smaller, less ambitious. A single chair sits empty near where the 
grandmother used to sit. Atmosphere feels quieter, slower, heavier. All faces pixelated Street 
View style. Same muted flat documentary color grading, pale sky, desaturated greens, 
weathered grey-beige road. Candid, unposed, emotionally real. 
 
PROMPT - 4 
Google Street View capture, 9:16 vertical format. Same house, same diagonal road, same 
camera angle. Fifteen years have passed. The house is now visibly abandoned. Plaster heavily 
cracked and peeling, exposing bare brick in patches. Roof tiles broken or slipped in one section. 
The metal fence is rusted, gate hanging open at an angle, never closed. The garden is entirely 
overtaken by wild grass and weeds, no flower border visible. Windows are dark, one cracked. 
No people in the yard. A single forgotten item — an old plastic crate or a weathered garden 
chair — sits half-buried in the overgrown grass, the only trace of the family life once lived here. 

Utility poles still standing along the road. The road is the same cracked asphalt, unchanged, 
indifferent. No faces, no people. Deep stillness. Same muted desaturated color grading, flat grey 
overcast sky, faded film quality. The image feels like an accidental capture of absence. 
Photorealistic, documentary, emotionally heavy, no filters.
